common.tagline: Chat with my Personal Knowledge Base to get to know me better

hero.title: Chat with my Alter-Ego
hero.highlight: to get to know me better
hero.subtitle: Chat with an intelligent assistant that knows everything about my career, experience, and skills. Also, see my blog posts and projects.

posts.title: Latest Posts
posts.subtitle: Carousels and blog posts about tech, software engineering, and the future of development.

chat.title: Chat with My Alter-Ego
chat.description: Have natural conversations with an AI that knows my entire career, skills, and experience. Ask anything about my work, projects, or tech opinions.

blog.title: Blog Posts
blog.description: Read long-form articles about tech, AI, and software engineering — researched, drafted, and designed with care.

carousels.title: Visual Carousels
carousels.description: Browse visually rich Instagram-style carousels that break down complex tech topics into beautiful, easy-to-digest slides.

about.label: About
about.paragraph1: I'm an AI Solutions Architect and full stack engineer based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, with more than 8 years of experience designing and shipping production grade applications.
about.paragraph2: I specialize in Angular (7 years), TypeScript, Python, and LLM orchestration with LangChain and LangGraph. My current focus is building RAG pipelines, multi agent systems, and AI native development workflows for enterprise clients.
about.paragraph3: My background spans full stack development, system architecture, and technical leadership. I have led teams building Angular applications serving millions of users, built Node.js microservices on AWS, and implemented serverless architectures for US based clients.
about.paragraph4: This project is my Alter Ego — an intelligent assistant powered by RAG that knows my entire career, skills, and projects. It answers questions about my work, generates content in my voice, and maintains consistency across everything I publish.

chat.title: Chat
chat.errorDescription: We encountered an error loading the chat interface. Please try again.
chat.empty: Start a conversation by typing a message below.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Manage your documents and information for the AI to reference.

empty.title: No documents yet.
empty.subtitle: Upload a file or create a document to get started.

knowledge.errorDescription: We could not load your documents. This might be a temporary issue.
knowledge.noResults: No documents found matching your search.

upload.title: Upload Document
upload.supports: Supports PDF, TXT, and MD files (max 50MB)

success.title: Document Uploaded
success.description: Your document has been processed successfully.

error.fileType: File type not supported. Use PDF, TXT, or MD files.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: AI-generated carousels and blog posts about tech, AI, and software engineering.
blog.noPosts: No blog posts yet. Generate a carousel to create your first post.

admin.title: Admin
admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post? This action cannot be undone.

create.pageDescription: Describe your topic and let AI generate a blog post and Instagram carousel for you.
create.lightThemeHint: Light theme — switched to the Flat Editorial preset so it renders correctly.

form.topicPlaceholder: e.g. Rust vs Go for backend development
form.imagePresetHelp: Picks the image model + style wrapper the pipeline uses. OpenAI presets require a verified OPENAI_API_KEY.
form.imageGuidancePlaceholder: e.g. misty harbor at dusk, retro-futuristic workshop, rainy neon street
form.imageGuidanceHint: max 500 chars — steers the scene/backdrop of every slide image; the brand style and palette stay locked

progress.failed: Generation failed. Try again or refine your request.
progress.stalled: Still working after {seconds}s — the upstream LLM may be retrying a dropped connection.

create.futureStep: This step has not been reached yet. The workflow is currently in {phase}.
create.startWorkflowHint: Start the workflow from the Brief tab to run this phase.

stepHistory.reviewHint: Open the Review tab during final review for carousel, blog, and caption previews.
stepHistory.publishEmpty: Caption and LinkedIn copy will appear after the content phase completes.
stepHistory.empty: No artifacts saved for this step yet.

workspace.title: Carousel Workspace
workspace.previewError: Could not load draft blog preview.
workspace.error: An error occurred while processing your request.

chat.error: An error occurred while processing your request.

blogEditorial.imagePromptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
blogEditorial.selectTextHint: Select text in the editor to get targeted suggestions.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Check
accessibility.hint: Run a check to validate alt text and heading structure

editorialWorkflow.title: Editorial Workflow

fields.title: Title
fields.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Research notes or article URL
fields.contentPlaceholder: Paste URL, notes, quotes, or reference text

actions.processing: Processing approval… this may take up to a minute.

feedback.label: Feedback for revision
feedback.placeholder: Describe what should change before approving this phase…
feedback.required: Feedback is required when requesting a revision.

persona.belowThreshold: Persona voice match is below the required threshold. Revise content before approving.

presentation.blockedApproval: Blocking presentation violations must be resolved before approving content.
presentation.editBudgetBlocked: Edited copy exceeds the presentation field budgets. Shorten the highlighted fields before approving.
presentation.unsavedEdits: Edited slide copy will be submitted with approval using the current workflow version.
presentation.designReviseDisabled: Requesting a plain revision is disabled while blocking violations are present — it does not change the slide text. Use "Edit slide copy" or "Send back to content" above.

editorialWorkflow.publishReady: Final review approved. Open the publish panel to release the carousel to the public site.

gate.title: Ready to start?
gate.description: Add source materials or continue without them. Generation begins only after you confirm.
gate.sourceCount: {count, plural, =0 {No materials added yet} one {# material added} other {# materials added}}

artifacts.title: Generated artifacts
artifacts.outlineSlides: {count, plural, one {# outline slide} other {# outline slides}}
artifacts.contentDrafts: {count, plural, one {# content draft} other {# content drafts}}
artifacts.imagesGenerated: {count, plural, one {# image generated} other {# images generated}}

review.contentGateBlocked: Automatic drafting could not produce valid copy for some slides after repair and one retry. Review the violations below before approving.
review.presentationBlocked: Approval is blocked until all presentation violations are resolved.
review.designReady: Design tokens are applied. Approve to generate slide images.
review.designPending: Review the outline and content above, then approve to apply design and generate images.

designRecovery.blockedTitle: Content violations are blocking the design step
designRecovery.hint: Fix these violations by editing the slide copy directly or by sending the workflow back to the content phase. Requesting a plain revision does not change the text.
designRecovery.sendBackFeedbackPlaceholder: Describe what the content phase should fix (e.g. remove scaffold text from slide 4)…
designRecovery.sendBackFeedbackRequired: Feedback is required to send the workflow back to content.
designRecovery.violationHint: Open the editor for this slide

review.outlineSlides: {count, plural, one {# slide in outline} other {# slides in outline}}
review.imagePromptsLink: {count, plural, one {# image prompt is available in the Images step.} other {# image prompts are available in the Images step.}}
review.emptyPhase: No generated content is available for this phase yet. Try refreshing or re-approving the previous step.

finalReview.title: Final review
finalReview.carouselEmpty: No slide content is available yet.
finalReview.blogPlaceholder: Blog markdown will appear here once generated.
finalReview.blogPreviewError: Could not load draft blog preview.
finalReview.captionEmpty: No caption has been generated yet.
finalReview.qualityEmpty: Quality scores are not available yet.

failed.description: The workflow encountered an error during the {phase} phase and could not continue. You can retry from the beginning.

errors.revisionCapExceeded: The revision limit for this phase is exhausted. You can still fix the copy: edit the slide text directly — direct edits are always available and never count against the limit.

empty.title: No custom palettes yet
empty.body: Create your first palette to extend the catalog. Root palettes stay available to everyone.

form.name: Name
form.keywordsHint: Lowercase, no overlap with brand keywords, up to 10.

error.load: Could not load the palette catalog.
error.duplicate: A palette with this name already exists.
error.invalid: Some fields are invalid. Check the colours and name.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

publish.awaitingFinalApproval: Complete final review in the create workspace before publishing to the public site.
publish.sitePublished: Carousel is now public on the blog.
publish.sitePublishFailed: Could not publish to the public site.

instagram.hashtagOver: Over the 30-hashtag limit — Instagram will reject the post.

linkedin.help: LinkedIn renders plain text — no markdown. Max 3000 characters.
linkedin.manualSteps: LinkedIn does not allow programmatic document posts for solo accounts. Copy the post, download the PDF, open LinkedIn, paste the caption, and attach the PDF as a document.

publish.chatHelp: Ask the agent to tweak a caption, shorten a LinkedIn post, or rewrite a slide heading. Changes save automatically.

regenerateStrategy.title: Slide Layout
regenerateStrategy.selectTemplate: Select a template style for your slides:

auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this page.

blogPosts.empty: No blog posts yet. Create your first post to get started.
blogPosts.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this blog post?

errors.versionConflict: This post changed in another session. The list was refreshed — try again.
errors.carouselDeleteBlocked: This post comes from a carousel and cannot be deleted while linked. Hide it, or delete the carousel project.

admin.deleteUserDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {email}? This cannot be undone.
